text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, Special Week and I are walking
back to the academy when...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew! Another day full of fun!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I was so anxious about everything when I first
came here, but now...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Having you by my side has made all that go away.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I can always rely on you, and it really helps me
calm my nerves when we get to spend time
together.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
choice_data_list: Just think of me as your mom away from home.
I'm less put together than you think.
It comes from wisdom and experience.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! I-I couldn't possibly do that!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uh, how do I put this...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You and my mom are different. It's not about you
taking her place.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So please continue to be there for me in your own
unique way, Trainer. Please!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh, really? That's a little unexpected.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But... I can relate to that.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I get scolded by my teachers for forgetting my
homework or leaving my umbrella behind when
it's raining—silly things like that...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I know! If you ever mess something up, I'll be
there to help you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll do my absolute best because you've always
had my back!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wisdom and experience! That sounds so mature!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanna gain wisdom and experience too! How
can I go about doing that?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Should I read a bunch of books? How about
talking to a lot of different people?!
choice_data_list: That, and a lot of other things too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
M-more things? That's so vague! Give me more to
work with, Trainer!
